steps.title: Map discovery to significance
steps.content: The text first explains how researchers used the JWST to measure wavelengths through WASP-39b's atmosphere and detect carbon dioxide. The final sentence then explains why that discovery matters: it is decisive evidence and shows the telescope's future potential.

steps.title: Reject false structures
steps.content: Choice A invents an alternative method. Choice C says the text presents a hypothesis, but the ending presents significance. Choice D invents a challenge from other scientists. The answer is B.
